'''sawawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacadash|wacadash]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacadash|wacadash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sawawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwæwæth|sæwæwæth]] || [[word:sæwæwæj|sæwæwæj]] || [[word:sæwæwæsh|sæwæwæsh]] || [[word:sæwæwæ|sæwæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawawawath|sawawawath]] || [[word:sawawawaj|sawawawaj]] || [[word:sawawawash|sawawawash]] || [[word:sawawawa|sawawawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawawath|sawawath]] || [[word:sawawaj|sawawaj]] || [[word:sawawash|sawawash]] || [[word:sawawa|sawawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawafwath|sawafwath]] || [[word:sawafwaj|sawafwaj]] || [[word:sawafwash|sawafwash]] || [[word:sawafwaf|sawafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawawatha|sawawatha]] || [[word:sawawaja|sawawaja]] || [[word:sawawasha|sawawasha]] || [[word:sawawaka|sawawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawawath|sawawath]] || [[word:sawawaj|sawawaj]] || [[word:sawawash|sawawash]] || [[word:sawawa|sawawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawawathal|sawawathal]] || [[word:sawawajal|sawawajal]] || [[word:sawawashal|sawawashal]] || [[word:sawawakal|sawawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawawathatha|sawawathatha]] || [[word:sawawajaja|sawawajaja]] || [[word:sawawashasha|sawawashasha]] || [[word:sawawaka|sawawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawawathan|sawawathan]] || [[word:sawawajan|sawawajan]] || [[word:sawawashan|sawawashan]] || [[word:sawawakan|sawawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawawathaoro|sawawathaoro]] || [[word:sawawajaoro|sawawajaoro]] || [[word:sawawashaoro|sawawashaoro]] || [[word:sawawakaoro|sawawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
